flags.description: Core role chapter gameplay
Repeatable learning activities
Flame-powered mini-games
Mentor feedback and weak-area suggestions
Personalized AI career coach dashboard, weekly plan, and safe mentor-style advice
Creator/admin AI scenario review surface
Adaptive story recommendations, dialogue injection, and admin-reviewed side mission drafts
Future premium role/chapter gating
Creator-only tooling in app
Legacy placeholder retained for compatibility; Phase 28 uses team_simulation.
Enable creator scenario pack marketplace and offline pack previews.
Enable multiplayer role-based team simulation rooms, turn decisions, scoring, and debrief.
Enable role-wise interview readiness mode with technical, behavioral, situation rounds, AI feedback, scoring, retry tips, and saved reports.
Enable role-wise final assessments, timed tests, practical mini-game scoring, certificates, verification IDs, and PDF certificate records.
Enable organization, batch, assignment, trainee progress dashboard, report export, custom scenario packs, and RBAC training mode.
Enable subtitle-first voice settings, TTS/STT placeholders, safe scenario-bound character chat, English/Hinglish/Hindi language mode, and text fallback.
Enable privacy-safe learning analytics events, personal dashboards, admin aggregates, progress insights, skill improvement tracking, and disable controls.
Enable purchase-ready monetization architecture: product catalog, premium locks, entitlements, placeholders, restore purchase, certificate payment, and corporate license support.

Enable production security and scale controls: secure token storage, rate limiting, request validation, admin RBAC, audit logs, content moderation, prompt abuse protection, backup/restore, monitoring, and privacy retention rules.
Enable Phase 36 cinematic Flame atmosphere, polished decision feedback, visual quality controls, and the Developer Chapter 1 Bug Hunt vertical slice.
